workflows.reconstructed_steps: Identify Context -> Search Visit -> Manage Coid -> View Locks -> Select Hospital -> Case Summary -> Coid Details -> Coid Status -> Injury Details -> Manage Images -> Manage Notes -> Poison Details

The rich coid final/progress medical report is missing
The rich coid claim status not accepted
